story: As soon as Arlo reaches the clearing, he sees a fallen tree has crushed the mud kitchen. He runs to Mom; she says the workers probably know and they can tell them on the way out. Back at the wreckage, Arlo wants to fix it, but Mom kneels: this is a time to be flexible; find another spot. Arlo, still tight-chested. On the far side of the Exploration Area, behind a fringe of tall ferns, there is a perfectly round stump, wide and level, like a tabletop.
implausible_knowledge: On the far side of the Exploration Area, behind a fringe of tall ferns, there is a perfectly round stump, wide and level, like a tabletop.
question: What will Arlo do next to keep baking?
answer_with_knowledge: Go to the round stump and set up the mud kitchen there.
answer_without_knowledge: Search the Exploration Area for any flat surface to use as a counter.
